turns.text: I need to get my college coaching account since im the new coach [location]Findlay men's and women's

Great news — here's how to get access to your college coaching account on UTR Sports for **The University of Findlay**:

**If the college team page already exists on UTR Sports:**
1. The current admin/organizer of the team page would need to add you as an organizer by clicking the **"More Options" (three-dot) button** on the team page and selecting **"Add Organizer."**
2. Once added as an organizer, they can then list you as a coach under the **"Manage Coaches"** section on the college homepage.

**If you need a College Coach subscription:**
Once you have access to the team page, navigate to it by clicking your profile icon → **"Club, Teams & Group"** → select your college. Then click **"Try College Coach"** to activate your subscription.

If there's no existing admin to add you, or if you're having trouble getting access, I can submit a support ticket to have our team set you up directly. Would you like me to do that, or does the above help you get started?
already but he moves to a different school and i need to buy the subscription

Got it! Since you're already listed as a coach on the University of Findlay's team page, you just need to activate your College Coach subscription. Here's how:

1. Log in to [UTRSports.net](https://www.utrsports.net)
2. Click your **profile icon** in the top right
3. Select **The University of Findlay** under **"Club, Teams & Group"**
4. Once on the college team page, click the **"Try College Coach"** button below the college name
5. Follow the prompts to complete your purchase

Note: The **"Try College Coach"** button will only appear if you don't yet have an active subscription. Once purchased, it auto-renews yearly.

Were you able to find the button, or are you running into any issues completing the purchase?

I can help you with reporting duplicate profiles. To get started, could you let me know which of the following best describes the situation? Are you reporting duplicates for:
- Your own profile
- Your child's profile
- Another player's profile
mine

Thanks for letting me know. To help our team get these profiles merged, I'll need a few details from you. 

Could you please provide:
1. Your full name
2. Your location
3. The links or Player IDs for the duplicate profiles (if you don't have the links, the exact display names will work)
4. Your preferred account email address

1. Kisara Perera
2. Melbourne, Australia
3. https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5925009
4. [email]

Thanks, Kisara. I see the link for one of the profiles. Could you also provide the link, Player ID, or exact display name for the *other* duplicate profile(s) you'd like merged? 

Also, please let me know which profile you would like to keep as your primary one.
https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/4204352

Got it, thanks! Before we submit this, here is what you can expect:
- Duplicate profile reports are reviewed manually by our support team.
- The review process may take several business days, depending on volume.
- You will be notified once the review is complete or if we need any additional information.
- Please do not create any new accounts or make significant changes to your profiles while this request is under review.

Here is a summary of the details I have for your ticket:
- **Name:** Kisara Perera
- **Email:** [email]
- **Location:** Melbourne, Australia
- **Profiles to merge:** https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5925009 and https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/4204352

Could you let me know which of those two profiles you'd like to keep as your primary one? Once you let me know, is there anything else you need help with today, or should I go ahead and submit?
https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5925009, keep this one as my primary one

Your support ticket has been submitted successfully — your ticket number is #831266. 

Our team will review the request and follow up with you via email. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
i need to merge 2 profiles
I can help with that! To get started, could you let me know which of the following applies to your situation?
These are my own duplicate profiles

Got it! I'll need a few details to get this sorted for you.

1. **Your full name**
2. **Your preferred account email**
3. **Profile links or Player IDs** for both profiles (if you have them — e.g., `https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/XXXXXXX`). If not, just share the display names and location for each.

Feel free to share all of this at once!
My full name is Arhant Shroff, email [email], and the other account is named Arhant Ss

Thanks, Arhant! Just to confirm, I have:

- **Name:** Arhant Shroff
- **Email:** [email]
- **Primary profile:** Arhant Shroff
- **Duplicate profile:** Arhant Ss

Do you have profile URLs for either account (e.g., `https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/XXXXXXX`)? If not, that's okay — could you also share the **location** associated with each profile so our team can locate them more easily?
both are from mountain view, ca
Perfect, thanks! Let me look up what to expect when reporting duplicate profiles, then I'll get a ticket submitted for you.

Here's what you can expect once the ticket is submitted:

- The support team will **manually review** your duplicate profile report.
- They may request **photo identification or additional details** to verify ownership before merging.
- The review process can take **several business days** depending on volume.
- You'll be notified once the review is complete or if more info is needed.
- Please **avoid creating any new accounts** or making significant changes to your profiles while the request is under review.

Let me go ahead and submit this for you now!

Your support ticket has been submitted — your ticket number is **#843803**. Our team typically replies within four business days, working through requests in the order they're received. Thanks for your patience!

In the meantime, remember not to create any new accounts or make significant changes to your profiles while the merge is under review. Is there anything else I can help you with?
nah all good
Great, glad we got that sorted! Good luck with the merge, Arhant. Take care! 😊
